benefits.description: Severe daily sinus swelling (starting at 3PM every day for nearly a decade) appears cured while using BPC157, which was originally started for ankle injury

protocol_notes: Nearly a decade of severe sinus swelling associated with multiple autoimmune diseases; tried many doctors and treatments including prescriptions and 3 MRIs without success. Afrin worked similarly to prescriptions. Started BPC157 for ankle; sinus swelling resolved as apparent side benefit. Still currently using BPC157.
